name: Amibegron
description: Amibegron is an agonist for atypical beta3-adrenoceptors which inhibits intestinal motility.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in depression, irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), and obesity.
mechanismOfAction: SR 58611 has positive chronotropic effect which is mainly of peripheral origin and can be attributed to a baroreceptor-mediated reflex due to the beta3-adrenoceptor mediated vasodilation with an increase in sympathetic tone and a reduction in vagal tone to the heart.

interactions.name: Cabergoline
interactions.description: Cabergoline may increase the hypertensive activities of Amibegron.

interactions.description: Bromocriptine may increase the hypertensive activities of Amibegron.
